title: What's in Store for C.H. Robinson (CHRW) in Q2 Earnings?
text: C.H. Robinson's (CHRW) second-quarter 2023 revenues are expected to have been weighed down by the lower pricing in its ocean and truckload services.

title: Analysts Estimate C.H. Robinson Worldwide (CHRW) to Report a Decline in Earnings: What to Look Out for
text: C.H. Robinson (CHRW) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.

title: C.H. Robinson Second Quarter 2023 Earnings Release and Conference Call Scheduled for Wednesday, August 2, 2023
text: EDEN PRAIRIE, Minn.--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $CHRW #CHRobinson--C.H. Robinson Second Quarter 2023 Earnings Release and Conference Call Scheduled for Wednesday, August 2, 2023.
